title: NyxIdentity
description: Identity schema for all Nyx platform accounts. Every user must choose a unique Nyx ID (handle) and supply an email at registration. Phone auth has been dropped — email-only.

nyx_id.title: Nyx ID
nyx_id.description: Your unique platform handle — visible across all Nyx apps unless privacy-linked. 3–30 characters: letters, digits, underscores, dots; no consecutive dots; cannot start or end with a dot.

display_name.title: Display name
display_name.description: Optional public name shown in the UI. Not used for login. Can contain any characters.
